Functions and data structures for managing, compiling, and parsing RegExp bytecode in JerryScript.


## Files
- **[re-bytecode.c](re-bytecode.c.md)**: Implements functions for managing and manipulating RegExp bytecode in the JerryScript engine.
- **[re-bytecode.h](re-bytecode.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for handling RegExp bytecode in the JerryScript parser.
- **[re-compiler.c](re-compiler.c.md)**: Implements a compiler for regular expressions, generating bytecode for pattern matching.
- **[re-compiler.h](re-compiler.h.md)**: Header file for the RegExp compiler context and functions in the JerryScript parser.
- **[re-parser.c](re-parser.c.md)**: Implements functions for parsing regular expressions, including handling character classes and quantifiers.
- **[re-parser.h](re-parser.h.md)**: Header file for defining regular expression token types, parser context, and related functions.
